summary: Genuine: test_create_review_task_without_governor_is_rejected exercises the real TaskService/store with no governor_task_id, asserts ValueError('governor') AND that no task was persisted (list_tasks()==[]), correctly failing today since the governor-required check is unimplemented; counterexample (governor supplied) is distinguished by the accepted-path test, confirming the boundary is genuinely enforced rather than keyword theater.
